betterquesting:10.desc:8:
I am a human. A person. 
I hold within my gaze the vibration of the universe, and yet, I am still human, a person.
A person I see mirrored in front of me.
A person I hate.
A person I tried to hide away.
A defect. The blemish in the resolve of a god of liberation.
But no, I am not that god of liberation I imagined myself to be.
I am still a person.
I was given the privilege to witness infinity, but I am still a person. 
Given, not taken. 
Gifted, not earned.
This fate I find myself living, it is still the fate of a scientist who got too eager, too hungry.
And I really should cherish that. Cherish this person.
Cherish this human. 
I.
